nodes.name: 胡胡伊省
nodes.summary: 胡胡伊省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联17种鸟类，包括安地斯銀鴨、金领金刚鹦鹉、Mottle-cheeked tyrannulet等17种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Speckled nightingale-thrush
nodes.summary: Speckled nightingale-thrush（Speckled nightingale-thrush，学名 Catharus maculatus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于胡胡伊省、萨尔塔省。

nodes.name: 萨尔塔省
nodes.summary: 萨尔塔省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联20种鸟类，包括金领金刚鹦鹉、White-tipped plantcutter、Southern antpipit等20种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: blakei is found from southern Bolivia into northern Argentina's Jujuy and Salta provinces. The speckled nightingale-thrush primarily inhabits humid tropical and subtropical forest where it favors the undergrowth in damp ravines and areas along forest streams. In elevation it ranges between in Venezuela, between in Colombia, mostly between but lower in the west in Ecuador, and between in the eastern Peruvian Andes and at about in Tumbes.{{cite book | last =Ridgely | first =Robert S
